The capital policy based on long-term yield maximisation for shareholders represents one of the most important aspects of implementing Petrol’s development strategy.

Dividend payments by individual financial periods

Financial period

Total amount of dividends according to the decision of the general meeting*

 Gross dividend
per share
2024 86,334,276.00 EUR 2.10 EUR

*In the period from 1993 to 2011 (except in 2004) and in 2018, the total amount of dividends according to the decision of the general meeting includes all shares, while in 2004 and in the period from 2012 to 2024 (except in 2018) the total amount of dividends according to the decision of the general meeting is without participation of own shares.

Petrol d.d., Ljubljana executed the PETG share split at a ratio of 1:20 on 1 November 2022, pursuant to resolutions adopted at the 34th General Meeting of Petrol d.d., Ljubljana, the number of PETG shares thus increased from 2,086,301 to 41,726,020.
